title: Jello's pvp optimizer
description: This mod makes right‑click actions feel quicker on high ping by retrying them once or twice. It helps pearls/snowballs/eggs, fishing rod, crossbow fire, and basic block placement.
body:
PVP Optimizer is a client‑side Fabric mod that retries certain right‑click actions (pearls, snowballs, eggs, fishing rod, crossbow fire, and block placement) to reduce missed inputs on high ping. It does not change server rules or cooldowns; it only re‑sends use actions to help them register.

-   ask your server before using (could be bannable)
